orchestrator_notes: Agents: read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. This is a code quality sprint remediating audit 0769 (score 6.3/10, target >= 8.0). Each phase is independent but sequential. Run ruff/eslint/vitest after changes to verify no regressions.
